name: canary
description: Sonomos Canary — persistent PII leak counter for Claude Code. Tracks every piece of sensitive data you expose to AI across sessions. Regex + Claude self-scan hybrid detection with a running counter and interactive dashboard.

llm_scan_enabled.description: Enable automatic Claude self-scan for semantic PII after every prompt (true/false, default: true)

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence to record a detection: high or medium (default: medium)
